Peptide Therapy, Made Simple

Physician-guided therapies for weight management, recovery, and healthy aging — prescribed for you, not off a shelf. Here's how it works:

01

Explore your options

Browse our peptide menu and see what each therapy can do — for your weight, recovery, sleep, skin, and more.

02

Complete your intake

A secure, HIPAA-compliant health questionnaire tells our medical team about your goals, history, and current health.

03

Talk with a doctor

A licensed provider reviews everything with you one-on-one and issues your prescription when it's right for you.

04

Start your program

Begin your therapy with provider guidance and follow-ups as your body responds — adjusted as you go.

What Is Peptide Therapy and How Does It Work?

Peptides are short chains of amino acids — your body's own messengers. They tell your body when to burn fat, build collagen, repair tissue, and release hormones. Peptide therapy uses prescription-grade peptides to support those natural processes.

Physician-Guided, Prescription-Based

This is not an over-the-counter supplement program. Every client completes a HIPAA-compliant health intake and a one-on-one call with a licensed provider. Your prescription is issued only when therapy is right for you, and your progress is monitored.

Peptides for Men and Women

Peptide therapy is used by both men and women — to manage weight, recover from training, sleep more deeply, sharpen focus, and keep skin and hair healthy. Your provider matches the right therapy to your body, your lifestyle, and your goals.

Benefits of Peptide Therapy

Three ways peptides can work for you — each backed by a physician-guided program.

01 · Weight Management

Lose the Weight.
Keep Your Momentum.

GLP-1 therapies like semaglutide and tirzepatide quiet food noise, control appetite, and support real, sustained weight loss — with a provider monitoring your progress every step of the way.

  • Reduces appetite and cravings so healthy choices come easier
  • Supports metabolic health, not just the number on the scale
  • Medically supervised dosing, adjusted to your body's response
SemaglutideTirzepatideTesamorelinMOTS-c
02 · Recovery & Repair

Train Hard.
Recover Faster.

Whether you're an athlete, a weekend warrior, or coming back from an injury, recovery peptides are studied for their role in tissue repair, soft-tissue healing, and gut health — helping your body do what it already knows how to do, faster.

  • Studied for muscle, tendon, and joint recovery
  • Supports gut health and calms inflammation
  • Get back to training — and life — sooner
BPC-157TB-500KPVGHK-Cu
03 · Healthy Aging

Feel Like Yourself.
Only More So.

Growth-hormone-releasing peptides support your body's own production of what naturally declines with age — deeper sleep, steadier energy, leaner body composition, and skin that keeps its collagen.

  • Supports deeper, more restorative sleep
  • Promotes lean muscle and collagen production
  • Steadier energy, sharper focus, healthier skin and hair
SermorelinCJC-1295 / IpamorelinGHK-CuEpitalon

The Full Peptide Menu

Every therapy we offer, available through our physician-guided process.

Pharmacy Grade Peptide Therapies

Established prescription medications
Semaglutide

GLP-1 therapy for medically supervised weight loss and appetite control.

Tirzepatide

Dual GIP/GLP-1 therapy for weight management and metabolic health.

Tesamorelin

Growth-hormone-releasing therapy that targets stubborn abdominal fat.

HCG

Supports hormonal balance and the body's natural testosterone production.

Gonadorelin

Supports the body's own hormone signaling; often paired with hormone programs.

Important: All peptide therapies are prescribed only after individual evaluation by a licensed medical provider.
